title: RNA Isolation of Pinctada fucata martensii
author: Xiong Xinwei
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.9qgh5tw

steps.title: Incubate for 5 minutes to permit...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 5 minutes to permit complete dissociation of the nucleoproteins complex.

steps.title: Add a steel ball to each...
steps.instruction: Add a steel ball to each tube and then flacker for 3 min by TissueLayer 2. The frequency is 26 (1/S). Repeat this step one time.

steps.title: Centrifuge the lysate for 15 minutes...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the lysate for 15 minutes at 12,000 × g at 4 ℃, then transfer the aqueous phase containing the RNA (~500 ul) to a new 1.5 mL tube.

steps.title: Take 50-100 mg of tissue to 2
steps.instruction: Take 50-100 mg of tissue to 2.0 mL tube, then add 1 mL of TRIzol™ Reagent per 50–100 mg of tissue to the tube.

steps.title: Add 200 ul Chloroform (4 ℃...
steps.instruction: Add 200 ul Chloroform (4 ℃ pre-cooling), then securely cap the tube and shake for 1 min to mix it completely. Then incubate for 10 min at 4 ℃.

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.5 mL of isopropanol to per 0.5 mL aqueous phase, then mix it gently.

steps.title: Incubate 10 min at 4 ℃
steps.instruction: Incubate 10 min at 4 ℃. Then centrifuge for 10 minutes at 12,000 × g at 4 ℃.

steps.title: Remove the supernatant as much as possible
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant as much as possible. Centrifuge for 1 minute at 12,000 × g at 4 ℃ to remove the supernatant completely if necessary.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet in 1 mL...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet in 1 mL of 75% ethanol per 1 mL of TRIzol™ Reagent used for lysis.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 5 min at 12,000...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 5 min at 12,000 × g at 4 ℃, then discard the supernatant. Repeat step 9 and step 10 for one time.

steps.title: Air-dry the RNA pellet for 5 min at 4 ℃
steps.instruction: Air-dry the RNA pellet for 5 min at 4 ℃.

steps.title: Resuspend the RNA pellet in 20–50 ul of RNase-free water
steps.instruction: Resuspend the RNA pellet in 20–50 ul of RNase-free water.

steps.title: Measuring the concentration of RNA by...
steps.instruction: Measuring the concentration of RNA by the instrument of SimpliNano and detecting RNA integrity using a 1% agarose gel.
